commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: address code review issues across library

Critical:
- Add early return in resolve() for non-chain locales (zero overhead)
- Document string equality detection limitation in README

Important:
- Fix settings.gradle.kts: dependencyResolution -> dependencyResolutionManagement
- Add Gradle wrapper (gradlew) for reproducible builds
- Change currentLocaleTag from lazy to computed property
- Use locale-aware String.format() for parameterized strings
- Add getQuantityText() override to prevent chain bypass
- Tighten ProGuard rules to only keep public static members
- Update version catalog (AGP 8.3.2, Kotlin 1.9.23, etc.)

Enhancements:
- Add configurable defaultLocale parameter to configure()
- Add @VisibleForTesting annotations on internal test helpers
- Add getStringArray() and getTextArray() overrides
- Fix sample app API 24+ crash on minSdk 21 devices
- Add CHANGELOG.md for release tracking
- Fix instrumented tests to fail explicitly when resId == 0

Tests:
- Add regression tests for early return on non-chain locales
- Add regression tests for custom defaultLocale parameter
- Add regression tests for FallbackMap non-chain locale checks

commit.message:
feat: v8.8.0 — Retrieve-and-Rerank con Cohere multilingual

- CohereRerank(rerank-multilingual-v3.0) via ContextualCompressionRetriever
- Pipeline en 3 capas apiladas en crear_retriever:
    1. FAISS (siempre activo, base semántica)
    2. BM25 + EnsembleRetriever/RRF (Hybrid RAG, top-20 candidatos)
    3. Cohere Reranker (top-20 → top-K, relevancia real)
- k_candidatos = min(k*5, 20): mayor recall antes del filtro final
- Degradación silenciosa: cada capa usa la anterior como fallback
- config.py: COHERE_API_KEY (vacía = sin reranking, modo v8.7)
- deps: cohere>=5.0.0, langchain-cohere>=0.3.0
- Secret Manager: agregar COHERE_API_KEY para activar en producción

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(cache): reduce page cache TTL from 24h to 30min for fresh daily data

Yesterday's spend showed $0 because the Streamlit cache (24h TTL) was
populated before the daily sync completed, serving stale data all day.
30min TTL ensures data refreshes shortly after the 5 AM sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: chunkcast-fuse — caching FUSE filesystem with block-level cache

Mirrors a source directory (e.g., gcsfuse mount) and caches file reads
locally as blocks. On cache miss, reads from source and caches the block.

Architecture:
  app → archivefs → chunkcast-fuse → local block cache → [gcsfuse → GCS]

Features:
- Directory-level caching (mirrors entire source tree)
- Block-level cache (32MB default, configurable)
- Cache-on-read: first access downloads, subsequent instant
- go-fuse v2 based (same as fedfs/redisfs)
- Prepared for P2P: block storage format compatible with ChunkCast protocol

Usage:
  chunkcast-fuse --source /gcs/bucket --cache-dir /var/cache /mnt/cached
  archivefs --root /mnt/cached --transparent /mnt/archive

commit.message:
Security hardening: rate limiting, SSRF guard, input validation, headers

1. lib/rate-limit.ts (new)
   - In-memory sliding-window rate limiter (no new deps)
   - getIp() helper reads x-forwarded-for / x-real-ip

2. lib/ssrf-guard.ts (new)
   - Blocks private IPs (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x, 127.x, 169.254.x)
   - Blocks non-http/https protocols (file://, ftp://, javascript:, etc.)
   - Blocks .local/.internal/.localhost hostnames + cloud metadata endpoints

3. lib/og-scraper.ts
   - Calls validateScrapeUrl() before fetching any URL (SSRF prevention)

4. app/api/subscribe/route.ts
   - Rate limit: 10 req / 60 min per IP → 429
   - Honeypot field: silently accept if 'website' field is non-empty (bot trap)
   - Email max length: 254 chars (RFC 5321)

5. app/api/admin/resources/route.ts + [id]/route.ts + scrape-og/route.ts
   - Rate limit auth failures: 5 wrong passwords / 15 min per IP → 429
   - Validate type against enum ['tool','learning','project','mcp']
   - Max lengths: name ≤200, description ≤2000, created_by ≤100
   - SSRF-check url, created_by_url, preview_image_url
   - Tags: max 20, each ≤50 chars, [a-z0-9-] only
   - scrape-og: 30 scrape calls / 5 min per IP

6. app/api/resources/route.ts
   - type param: validated against allowed enum (unknown values → ignored)
   - tag param: lowercased, stripped to [a-z0-9-], max 50 chars
   - cursor param: NaN-safe parseInt, clamped to ≥0
   - q param: max 100 chars (then existing strip+min-2 logic)

7. next.config.ts
   - Security headers on all routes: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options,
     X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy

8. supabase-schema.sql
   - ALTER TABLE subscribers ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY (was missing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Auto-merge: claude/fix-toll-freezing-v2-aAfIp (#449)

* Fix toll freezing: add circuit breaker and show Pending instead of Unreachable

- Add circuit breaker to TollSpot API client (stops hammering dead API after 2 failures, retries after 5min cooldown)
- Change per-vehicle toll display from "Unreachable" to "Pending" with yellow/neutral styling
- Move error messaging from per-vehicle badges to a single top-level banner
- Add auto-sync on dashboard load so toll status is checked automatically
- Banner provides Retry and Clear All actions when TollSpot is down

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Trigger auto-merge workflow for toll freezing fix

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Fix circuit breaker causing alert popup on enroll

When circuit breaker is open, treat it as a network error so the vehicle
silently saves as pre_registered instead of showing a 502 error alert.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Fix stretched View Tolls and Message Host buttons in driver portal

Changed flex property from '1 1 auto' to '0 0 auto' on .booking-actions .btn
so buttons size to their content instead of growing to fill available space.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Fix vehicle tripCount never being incremented

The tripCount field was defined on the Vehicle model but never updated.
Added $inc: { tripCount: 1 } when bookings complete via:
- Return inspection completion
- Manual status change to completed
- Auto-expiration of stale active bookings

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Add tripCount backfill on server startup

Aggregates completed bookings per vehicle and sets the correct tripCount
on each vehicle. Runs once on startup after MongoDB connects.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Fix rental subtotal display on Checkout page

The rental subtotal was reverse-calculated by subtracting fees from
totalPrice, but driverProcessingFee wasn't updated after insurance
changes, causing a mismatch (e.g. $1.22 instead of $1.00).

Fix: use pricePerDay * totalDays directly (already stored on booking),
and also sync driverProcessingFee/platformFee in handleInsuranceChange.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Remove special styling from insurance row in Checkout summary

The Liability Coverage line had a distinct green/white highlight that
made it visually inconsistent with the other summary rows. Removed the
"insurance" CSS class so it matches the rest of the booking summary.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Remove manual host payout endpoints, keep weekly-only payouts

Hosts should not be able to trigger their own payouts. Removed the
transfer-earnings and transfer-all-eligible endpoints from the backend,
and replaced the "Transfer Now" button with a note that payouts are
processed automatically every Monday via the weekly scheduler.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Make Awaiting Payment badge clickable to resume checkout

When a booking is in awaiting_payment status, the status badge now
links to /payment/checkout?booking_id=<id> so the driver can return
to the checkout flow and complete payment.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Extend awaiting_payment auto-cancel window from 30 min to 1 hour

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

* Remove processing fee from vehicle detail price preview

The processing fee shown here was based on rental + platform fee only,
but insurance (mandatory) is added on the Checkout page which changes
the fee. Showing the pre-insurance fee was confusing. Now the preview
shows rental + platform fee as "Estimated Total", and the full
breakdown with processing fee appears on Checkout.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QtQQtMDx3wMHmPXgZCrNEm

---------

replace manual replication with bevy_replicon

Swap ~300 lines of hand-rolled component diffing, DaemonEvent
serialization, and MirrorBackend event replay with bevy_replicon's
server-authoritative replication. Components marked Replicated now
auto-sync; log lines stream as mapped server events. Transport is a
roam-based backend (replicon_transport.rs) that bridges replicon's
ServerMessages/ClientMessages to roam streams over Unix sockets.

Auto-scale early stopping min_delta by n_features

auto-compute min_delta = n_features * 0.0003 (~2.5x noise floor per gene).
RNA (17,750 genes): ~5.3, Multimodal (134,240 features): ~40.3.

commit.message:
High-fidelity LiDAR + TSDF: 128-channel ±30° rays, IMU correction, 1cm voxels

DirectScanner: 16 vertical channels → 128 at ±30° (was ±15°), full
R(yaw,pitch,roll) IMU rotation for body-tilt-corrected rays. 3DS
completeness jumps from 2.9% → 40-71%, adherence from 30.8mm → 7-8mm,
phantom from 14.1% → 0.0%.

TSDF voxel size set to 1cm in game_setup.py (layer_6 default is 10cm).
God score formula rebalanced to 40/20/40 (precision/completeness/purity)
so max achievable score is 100 instead of 80. GT Z-range filter added
to get_occ_str for fair completeness scoring.

Unified navigation: single committed A* path for both green dots and
waypoint following. Ground-truth pose for navigation (SLAM drifts 6m+).
wz EMA smoothing to dampen gait-induced yaw oscillation. Clearance-based
speed limiting near obstacles. Narrower TIP hysteresis (0.7× exit).

Removed DWA subsystem (dwa_controller, dwa_navigator, reactive_scan,
stuck_recovery) — heading-proportional control with A* path following
replaces it.

Documented in docs/lidar-tsdf-architecture.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Unify CRITICAL tasks as batch-of-1 (#157)

* Unify CRITICAL tasks as batch-of-1, removing separate RunCritical path

A CRITICAL finding is fundamentally just a batch of size 1. This removes
the separate `RunCritical` variant and dispatch arm, routing CRITICALs
through the same `RunBatch` pipeline with severity-aware retry logic.

commit.message:
Fix new MCP terminal inflating crumbs from stale save data

When a new AI terminal connected, the MCP server loaded historical crumbs
from the save file. The CRDT merge fallback used Math.max, which kept the
stale higher value instead of trusting the running game's crumbs.

Fix: Reset MCP CRDT counters (_mcpEarned/_mcpSpent) to 0 on startup, then
seed them from the game's _lastMcpEarnedApplied on first sync so unapplied
delta starts at 0. Remove the Math.max fallback on both MCP and game side
to prevent stale crumbs from ever overriding the authoritative game state.

commit.message:
fix notifications: always show OS notification regardless of app tab state

Root cause: SW only called showNotification() when no ZTM tab was open.
Users on Facebook/YouTube with ZTM open in a background tab never saw the
PC corner notification — the broadcast only reached the hidden ZTM tab.

- Remove !appOpen guard: OS notification now fires unconditionally so users
  see it in the Windows/Mac notification corner even while on other sites
- Add silent: false explicitly to ensure system notification sound plays
- Update SW_REMINDER page handler to use the new label/isUrgent fields from
  the refactored SW (removes hard-coded '15m'/'1h'/'24h' type checks)
- Fix in-page polling dedup keys to match SW format (24h→1440m, 1h→60m)
  so SW and page don't fire duplicate toasts for the same reminder

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add oposiciones template with TOC, page breaks and per-template config

- New "oposiciones" template: TNR 12pt everywhere (incl. headings),
  line-height 1.15, 25/30mm margins, black table borders — matches
  Orden 20/02/2026 BOJA requirements
- Pre-process \newpage markers into CSS page-break divs
- Add markdown-it-toc-done-right plugin for [[toc]] support
- Support optional config.json per template (margins, header/footer)
- Add fonts-freefont-ttf to Dockerfile for TNR mapping in Chromium

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update README — add graph as 7th plugin in the suite

Adds graph plugin to the plugin table, architecture diagram, installation
paths, load order, deployment modes, inter-plugin communication, and credits.
Fixes stray code fence.
